historyNotRunYet: History diagnostics have not been run yet.
bitcoinEsploraHint: Leave endpoints blank to use the built-in endpoint set for the selected network.
ethereumRPCNote: Optional. Leave this blank to use Spectra's default public Ethereum endpoint. Add your own RPC URL if you want a dedicated provider for live ETH and ERC-20 watched-address balances.
etherscanNote: Optional but recommended for ETH token history reliability. Without a key, Etherscan may return NOTOK due to rate limits.
moneroBackendNote: Used for Monero balance/history/send in this build. Default backend is preconfigured; switch to Custom URL to override.
moneroAPIKeyNote: Optional bearer token used by your backend.
dogecoinTestnetNote: Keep this off for production wallets. Turn it on only when you intentionally use Dogecoin testnet addresses.
